NAVAREA XIX 14/22
 BARENTS SEA
 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING 20 TO 22 FEB 0700 TO 1300 UTC DAILY
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A. 73-46.0N 020-30.0E
 B. 74-30.0N 023-00.0E

 2. AREA IS DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION
 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 221400 UTC FEB 22
